# Nantian Gateway
> High-performance Kubernetes Gateway API implementation with Go control plane, Rust data plane, and built-in AI gateway capabilities. Targets Gateway API v1.5.1 with 55 declared features.

## Concepts
- [Core Concepts](https://nantian.dev/concepts/): Gateway fundamentals, API gateway terminology, and why use Nantian Gateway
- [Gateway API](https://nantian.dev/concepts/gateway-api/): Understanding the Kubernetes Gateway API resource model and how Nantian Gateway implements it
- [Split-Plane Architecture](https://nantian.dev/concepts/split-plane/): Go control plane and Rust data plane separation, xDS communication, independent scaling

## Overview
- [What is Nantian Gateway](https://nantian.dev/overview/): Project overview, key features, architecture at a glance
- [Comparison](https://nantian.dev/comparison/): Comparison with Envoy Gateway, Istio, Contour, and NGINX Gateway Fabric
- [Use Cases](https://nantian.dev/use-cases/): AI gateway, gRPC routing, service mesh, Wasm extensions

## Getting Started
- [Prerequisites](https://nantian.dev/getting-started/prerequisites/): Kubernetes cluster, CLI tools, and Gateway API CRD requirements
- [Quick Start](https://nantian.dev/getting-started/quick-start/): Deploy Nantian Gateway on a local Kind cluster in 5 minutes
- [Your First Route](https://nantian.dev/getting-started/first-route/): Create Gateways and HTTPRoutes to proxy traffic to backend services

## Installation
- [Installation Overview](https://nantian.dev/installation/): Available installation methods and deployment options
- [Helm](https://nantian.dev/installation/helm/): Install via Helm chart with custom values
- [Kustomize](https://nantian.dev/installation/kustomize/): Install via Kustomize overlays
- [Production](https://nantian.dev/installation/production/): Production deployment with TLS, resource limits, and security
- [High Availability](https://nantian.dev/installation/ha/): Multi-zone deployment, leader election, failure recovery
- [Upgrade Guide](https://nantian.dev/installation/upgrade/): Version upgrade procedures

Current Helm chart facts: the Helm chart is published at https://chart.nantian.dev, lives in helm-charts/charts/nantian-gw, defaults to featureMode: standard, does not render Gateway API CRDs unless gatewayAPI.installCRDs=true, uses the latest tag for controlplane, dataplane, and dashboard images by default, and production values should pin immutable release tags or digests.

## Configuration
- [Configuration Overview](https://nantian.dev/configuration/): General configuration structure and common settings
- [Control Plane](https://nantian.dev/configuration/controlplane/): Complete control plane configuration reference with all parameters
- [Data Plane](https://nantian.dev/configuration/dataplane/): Complete data plane configuration reference with all parameters
- [TLS / mTLS](https://nantian.dev/configuration/tls/): TLS configuration for admin API, gRPC, and data plane
- [gRPC xDS](https://nantian.dev/configuration/xds/): xDS protocol configuration and optimization
- [Observability](https://nantian.dev/configuration/observability/): Logging, Prometheus metrics, and OpenTelemetry tracing
- [Performance Tuning](https://nantian.dev/configuration/tuning/): Threading, connection pools, buffer sizes, timeouts, and profiling

## Architecture
- [Architecture Overview](https://nantian.dev/architecture/): System architecture, component interactions, and data flow
- [Control Plane Design](https://nantian.dev/architecture/controlplane/): Go control plane internals, translator, xDS server
- [Data Plane Design](https://nantian.dev/architecture/dataplane/): Rust data plane internals, proxy runtime, Wasm engine
- [Admin API](https://nantian.dev/architecture/admin-api/): Admin API endpoints, authentication, and usage

## Operations
- [Operations Overview](https://nantian.dev/operations/): Operational guidance and monitoring
- [Metrics Reference](https://nantian.dev/operations/metrics/): All available Prometheus metrics
- [Grafana Dashboard](https://nantian.dev/operations/grafana/): Pre-built Grafana dashboards for visualization
- [Alerting Rules](https://nantian.dev/operations/alerting/): Recommended alerting configurations
- [Troubleshooting](https://nantian.dev/operations/troubleshooting/): Common issues and diagnostic procedures
- [Backup & Recovery](https://nantian.dev/operations/backup/): Backup strategies and recovery procedures

## API Reference
- [API Reference Overview](https://nantian.dev/api-reference/): API documentation structure
- [Gateway API Resources](https://nantian.dev/api-reference/gateway-api/): Supported Gateway API resources and features
- [Custom CRDs](https://nantian.dev/api-reference/crds/): AIService, TokenPolicy, WasmPlugin, BackendLBPolicy
- [Admin API](https://nantian.dev/api-reference/admin-api/): Admin API endpoint reference
- [xDS Protocol](https://nantian.dev/api-reference/xds-proto/): xDS protocol specification

## Contributing
- [Contributing Overview](https://nantian.dev/contributing/): How to contribute to Nantian Gateway
- [Development Setup](https://nantian.dev/contributing/development/): Local development environment setup
- [Testing Guide](https://nantian.dev/contributing/testing/): Testing procedures and guidelines
- [Release Process](https://nantian.dev/contributing/release/): Release workflow and versioning

## FAQ
- [Frequently Asked Questions](https://nantian.dev/faq/): Common questions and answers
